title: AS Bearing Capacity
description:
Bearing Capacity Calculator as per
AS 4678-2002 or AS 5100:2017.

drawing_type.description: Drawing. Symbol: Method. Drawing to display in center

method.description: Method. Symbol: Method. Method for analysis.

shape.description: Shape. Symbol: Shape. Shape of foundation.

drainage.description: Drainage. Symbol: Drainage. Drained assessment or undrained assessment.

B.description: B. Symbol: B. Units: m. Width of footing.

L.description: L. Symbol: L. Units: m. Length of footing.

D.description: D. Symbol: D. Units: m. Depth to bottom of footing from soil surface.

c.description: c. Symbol: c. Units: kPa. Effective soil cohesion.

c_u.description: cu. Symbol: c_u. Units: kPa. Undrained cohesion strength of soil.

c_a.description: ca. Symbol: c_a. Units: kPa. Adhesion between soil and base of foundation. Typically in range of 0.6 - 1.0 x soil cohesion.

phi.description: φ. Symbol: φ. Units: °. Effective internal friction angle.

gamma.description: γ. Symbol: γ. Units: kN/m3. Soil unit weight above water table.

gamma_l.description: γl. Symbol: γ_{l}. Units: kN/m3. Saturated unit weight.

D_w.description: Dw. Symbol: D_{w}. Units: m. Depth to water table.

q.description: q. Symbol: q. Units: kPa. Permanent surcharge load at surface level adjacent to footing resisting bearing failure (note that variable is not available as an option since q is always stabilising for bearing and a factor of 0 would be applied to such a load).

load_case.description: Load Case. Symbol: lc. Load case to be used in calculations.

concrete_unit_weight.description: γc. Symbol: γ_{c}. Units: kN/m3. Concrete unit weight.

footing_thickness.description: t. Symbol: t. Units: m. Thickness of footing.

beta.description: β. Symbol: β. Units: °. Base on slope or adjacent to slope.

eta.description: η. Symbol: η. Units: °. Tilted base angle.

annex.description: Design Standard. Symbol: Standard. Design Standard for determining safety factors in design bearing capacity calculation.

soil_condition.description: Soil Condition. Symbol: Soil. Soil or fill conditions for use in determining soil or material uncertainty factor for AS 4678 design. See AS 4678 1.4.3 for descriptions of different soil conditions.

live_reduction.description: ψc. Symbol: ψ_{c}. Reduction factor for live load when considering wind.

permanent_load_destabilising_factor.description: γG;dst. Symbol: γ_{G;dst}. Load factor for permanent destabilising loads.

permanent_load_stabilising_factor.description: γG;stb. Symbol: γ_{G;stb}. Load factor for permanent stabilising loads.

variable_load_destabilising_factor.description: γQ;dst. Symbol: γ_{Q;dst}. Load factor for variable destabilising loads.

variable_load_stabilising_factor.description: γQ;stb. Symbol: γ_{Q;stb}. Load factor for variable stabilising loads.

wind_load_destabilising_factor.description: γW;dst. Symbol: γ_{W;dst}. Load factor for wind destabilising loads.

wind_load_stabilising_factor.description: γW;stb. Symbol: γ_{W;stb}. Load factor for wind stabilising loads.

phi_factor.description: φuφ. Symbol: φ_{uφ}. Material uncertainty factor for soil effective friction angle (aka shearing resistance).

c_factor.description: φc. Symbol: φ_{uc}. Material uncertainty factor for soil cohesion.

c_u_factor.description: φcu. Symbol: φ_{ucu}. Material uncertainty factor for soil undrained shear strength.

gamma_factor.description: φγ. Symbol: φ_{uγ}. Material uncertainty factor for soil unit weight. Not explicitly defined in AS 4678.

bearing_factor.description: φgb. Symbol: φ_{gb}. Geotechnical Strength Reduction Factor for bearing capacity as per AS 5100, typically used with unfactored characteristic values of material parameters (AS 5100 2.3.2).

sliding_factor.description: φgs. Symbol: φ_{gs}. Geotechnical Strength Reduction Factor for stability (sliding and overturning) as per AS 5100, typically used with unfactored characteristic values of material parameters (AS 5100 2.3.2).

sensitivity.description: Parameter. Choose a variable to run a sensitivity analysis on if required. This will graph how variations in the chosen variable effect the bearing capacity.

sensitivity_min.description: Min. Symbol: min. Minimum value for sensitivity analysis.

sensitivity_max.description: Max. Symbol: max. Maximum value for sensitivity analysis.

steps.description: Data Points. Number of data points for sensitivity analysis.

alpha_1.description: α1. Symbol: α_1. Exponent for Hansen inclination factor (iq).

alpha_2.description: α2. Symbol: α_2. Exponent for Hansen inclination factor (iγ).

friction_ratio.description: δ / φ. Symbol: δ / φ. Ratio between external friction angle (δ) and internal friction angle (φ).

passive_resistance.description: Passive Sliding Resistance. Symbol: H_p. Units: kN. Passive resistance to consider in sliding assessment.

show_net_bearing.description: Show qu,net. Whether to show the net bearing pressure as defined in DAS 'factor of safety' section.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
